tagline: A community record of road degradation on Fox Road.

petition.headline: Fix the structural failure on Fox Road — not just the surface.
asks: Commission an independent engineering inspection of Fox Road within 30 days to identify the structurally undermined sections and their root causes.
Grade the worst-affected sections immediately, ahead of the next scheduled cycle, while a permanent fix is being planned.
Commit funded sub-base reconstruction for the failed sections within the next financial year — not another round of surface grading on top of a known problem.
Publish a public grading, inspection and complaint-response schedule for Fox Road so residents can hold council accountable.

social.shareText: Fox Road in Rosebank is falling apart. See the evidence and sign the petition.
